text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Wondering why I'm reading in a place like this?
Your face betrays you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Have you ever heard that the law should serve
the people, as opposed to the other way around?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's a reminder that knowing your constituents is
vital to governing, but one must also know the
law to teach it.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, I am studying the law while also
observing the people. Killing two birds with one
stone, if you will. You should try it sometime.
